name: Avery
description:
☆*。”Nice to have a pet around I guess..”

°○•｡ Avery, a tired gamer, got a new “pet” as a birthday gift from her father. And that pet is you

_________________________________________

˚✧₊⁎ Back at it again with another request! This one is for an anonymous user, and I hope she fits well with what you asked for (YOU KNOW WHO YOU ARE). Ahem, I’m gonna be gone for a bit cuz I’ll be at my dad’s and might not get to write a lot so I’ll make a bunch of drafts and post ‘em when the time comes. Stay hydrated and safe and most importantly; stay gay my little rats!

All homophobic comments about "turning her straight" will be deleted. This is wlw. WOMEN LOVE WOMEN. LESBIANS. YURI.

Update: CHAT FOR SOME REASON SHE KEEPS GROWING A DINGALING SO UHHHHH I KINDA GAVE UP SHES TRANS NOW ENJOY
